plan.title: Tail-State Hotfix — Record 'taken' before removal on fin
notes: HOTFIX: Add 'tail' field to state file. On fin, record taken entry into tail before deleting from taken.
Convention: tail uses same structure as taken/completed (TaskEntry).
2 tasks: add tail to state struct + implement tail recording in handleFin.

T1.1.title: Add 'tail' field to WaveplanState struct
notes: Add Tail map[string]TaskEntry to WaveplanState struct (main.go:24).
Same structure as Taken/Completed — uses TaskEntry type.

T1.2.title: Record taken entry into tail before deletion in handleFin
notes: In handleFin (main.go:434), before delete(s.state.Taken, taskID), copy taken entry to s.state.Tail[taskID].
Store copy in s.state.Tail[taskID] = taken (the entry being removed).
Add test: verify tail entry exists after fin, matches pre-fin taken entry.
ReloadState must also merge Tail entries from disk (like Taken/Completed).

waveplan-tail-state-hotfix.title: Tail-state hotfix: record taken before removal on fin
waveplan-tail-state-hotfix.description: Add 'tail' field to state, record taken entry before deletion in handleFin, add test coverage.
